markets.no_sub_title: Tie
markets.rules_primary: If Tie is the result of the second half of regulation time in the Cleveland vs Milwaukee professional basketball game originally scheduled for Mar 17, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team that scores the most points during the specified half. Only points scored during the specified half of play count towards this market. If both teams score the same amount of points during the half, all team strikes resolve to No and the Tie strike resolves to Yes. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two weeks).
